perturbed: continuous features (duration, credit amount, age); Gaussian eps*train-std, clipped to train range, rounded to int; ordinals + one-hots left intact
note: eps = noise sd as a fraction of each feature's train std (a synthetic probe, not calibrated to real error logs). flip = fraction of decisions changed vs unperturbed; flip_ci95 = 95% instance-bootstrap CI. Age is perturbed as generic input noise.
